name: pankllm-agents

metadata.description: PanKLLM multi-agent system for biomedical knowledge queries

plugins.name: format-agent
plugins.description: Format raw sub-agent data (Neo4j results, GLKB abstracts, Cypher queries) into structured JSON responses with hallucination checking. Uses Claude Opus 4.6 with specialized prompts for WITH-LITERATURE and NO-LITERATURE modes.

when_to_use: After sub-agents (PankBase, GLKB, TemplateToolAgent) have returned raw data
When Neo4j results need to be synthesized into a user-facing summary
When hallucination checking is needed on generated summaries
when_not_to_use: During initial query planning (use PlannerAgent instead)
When querying databases directly (use PankBaseAgent or GLKB agent)
For template matching queries that don't need formatting

test_queries: What is the role of CFTR in Type 1 Diabetes?
What SNPs are associated with IRF4?
